name: NEOGEN CORP
sic_description: In Vitro & In Vivo Diagnostic Substances
summary: Neogen Corporation and its subsidiaries develop, manufacture and market a diverse line of products and services dedicated to food and animal safety. Our Food Safety segment consists primarily of diagnostic test kits and complementary products (e.g., culture media) sold to food and animal feed producers and processors to preserve the safety and quality of food to prevent contamination and foodborne illnesses such as foodborne pathogens, spoilage organisms, natural toxins, food allergens, and rumi...
